title: mimulus guttatus var. arvensis
intro: Mimulus guttatus var. arvensis, commonly known as the field monkey flower, is a variety of the monkey flower plant that is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Mimulus guttatus var. arvensis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine.
